Configure how bills and receipts are generated.
Show GST on bill
Add GST number to bill header

Bills will be numbered RCP-001, RCP-002...

✎ Rename / Renumber All Existing Bills
Change the prefix and/or starting number for all existing bill IDs. Bills will be sorted by date and renumbered in order.
! This updates all existing bill IDs -- cannot be undone.
💸 Rename / Renumber All Existing Expenses
Change the prefix and/or starting number for all existing expense IDs. Expenses will be sorted by date and renumbered in order.
! This updates all existing expense IDs -- cannot be undone.

💾 Data & Backup
Export your data or restore from a backup file.
📌 Auto-Save File (Local Storage)
📄 Auto-save on Logout
Choose a file on your device. Every time you log out, all data (bills + expenses + settings) will be automatically saved to that file -- overwriting it each time. No duplicate files.
📄
No file selected
Click "Choose File" to pick a save location
Auto-save on logout
Automatically overwrite the file when you log out
📌 Auto-save on close / background
Silently save when app is closed, tab hidden, or you navigate away
✓ Last saved: --
⚠ Your browser does not support the File System Access API. Use Chrome or Edge for this feature. You can still use manual export below.
Save / Export
Import / Restore

Danger zone
📋 Clear All Data Only
Deletes bills, expenses, appointments and patient files. Keeps clinic settings, Firebase & server config intact.
⚡ Clear Data + Firebase Config
Deletes bills, expenses, appointments, patient files and removes saved Firebase / Live Sync settings. Local Server config kept.
🔁 Clear Data + Local Server Config
Deletes bills, expenses, appointments and patient files. Firebase config kept.
🗑 Clear Everything
Permanently deletes all bills, expenses, appointments, patient files, Firebase config, Local Server config and all settings. Cannot be undone.
Total bills stored: 0  |  Storage used: --

⚡ Live Sync - Real-time Multi-device
Use Google Firebase to sync bills across all your devices in real time -- reception desk, doctor's room, and phone.
How it works
Create a free Firebase project at console.firebase.google.com, enable Realtime Database, copy your config below and all devices on the same config sync instantly.
🔒 Smart Paste -- Auto Fill Config
Copy your firebaseConfig object from Firebase Console and paste it here -- all fields will fill automatically!
const firebaseConfig = {
  apiKey: "AIzaSy...",
  authDomain: "app.firebaseapp.com",
  databaseURL: "https://...",
  ...
};
Firebase project config -- or fill manually below
Unique key for this clinic's data path in the database
Mobile select clinic info clinic_info/mobile , Desktop select clinic_info/desktop save -- bills/expenses shared
Firebase Authentication (Email & Password)
Secure your data
Enable Email/Password sign-in in Firebase Console -> Authentication -> Sign-in method. Then enter your clinic's Firebase user credentials below. Data is stored under each user's UID, and Firebase Rules enforce that only the authenticated user can read/write their own data.
Email registered in Firebase Authentication
Password for the Firebase user above
✓ Config saved!
Sync status
Not connected
Configure Firebase above to enable live sync
Sync options
Auto-sync new bills
Every new bill will be pushed to Firebase instantly
Pull changes on open
Latest data will be fetched from cloud when app opens
Real-time listener
True real-time -- changes from other devices appear instantly (uses Firebase SSE push, no polling)
Manual sync
Step-by-step setup
1. Go to console.firebase.google.com -> Create project
2. Build -> Realtime Database -> Create database
3. Authentication -> Sign-in method -> Enable Email/Password
4. Authentication -> Users -> Add user (clinic email + password)
5. Realtime Database -> Rules -> paste: {"rules":{"$synckey":{"$uid":{".read":"auth!=null && auth.uid==$uid",".write":"auth!=null && auth.uid==$uid"}}}}
6. Project Settings -> Your apps -> Add Web app -> Copy config
7. Paste config + email + password above -> Save & Connect
💾 Firebase Config Backup & Restore
Save your Firebase configuration to a file so you can restore it later if cleared or moved to a new device.
📅 Auto Weekly Firebase Backup
📅 Weekly Auto Backup to Firebase
Automatically push a full data snapshot to Firebase every 7 days
Backup Status
Not yet run
Last backup: --
⚠ Backups are stored at weekly_backups/{date}/ in your Firebase Realtime Database. Firebase must be configured and connected above.
☁ Supabase Sync (Backup)
Secondary cloud backup — data saved to both Firebase & Supabase for maximum safety.
Not configured
Supabase → Project Settings → API → Project URL
Supabase → Project Settings → API → anon public key
! When you change the secret key, click Update Secret in Supabase below -- SQL will be generated automatically.
Create one login per clinic in Supabase Dashboard → Authentication → Users, then sign in here. This is required for the Auth-based security policies in the setup SQL below -- without signing in, only the legacy (less secure) scheme applies.
Not signed in
Real-time Sync Status
Not started -- configure URL & Key above
App automatically polls Supabase every 30 seconds for new data from other devices. You can also press Sync Now above for instant update.
🔄 Manual Push / Pull
⬆ Push -- Local -> Supabase
local data Supabase upload
⬇ Pull -- Supabase -> Local
Supabase data device restore
⚠ Pull local data Supabase data merge . data delete .
⚙ Settings Backup -- Export / Import
Clinic info, billing options, theme, Firebase & Supabase config -- save everything in one file or restore from backup.
⬆ Export Settings
Download all your settings as a .json file.
⬇ Import Settings
Select a previously exported .json settings file to restore.
! Importing will replace your existing settings. Bills & patient data will not be affected.
⚠ Setup required: Click Test Connection after entering credentials — tables will be auto-created.
🖶 Print Format & Page Setup
Configure page layout, pre-printed stationery options, margins, and what to show/hide on prints.
Bill & Receipt Layout Template
Each template has its own layout. Paper size & margin settings below still apply.
Paper & page size
Pre-printed stationery options
Pre-printed stationery tip
Use these when printing on stationery that already has your clinic name/logo pre-printed at the top.
Hide clinic name & header
Do not print clinic name, address, phone on bill (for pre-printed letterhead)
Hide clinic logo area
Skip the top logo/name block entirely
Hide footer tagline
Do not print the footer message
Compact mode (smaller fonts)
Reduce font sizes for denser layouts
Show border/box around bill
Print outer border rectangle around the bill
Top spacing for pre-printed header
Adds blank space at top to align below your pre-printed letterhead
Bill layout preview
Classic
✓ Saved!
💊 Prescription Print Settings
Configure page layout, paper size, margins, and pre-printed stationery options specifically for prescription printing.
Paper & Page Size
Pre-printed Stationery Options
💡 Pre-printed stationery tip
Use these when printing on prescription pads that already have your clinic name/logo/letterhead pre-printed at the top. Hide the header and set a top spacing to align content correctly below your pre-printed letterhead.
Hide clinic name & header
Do not print clinic name, address, phone on prescription (for pre-printed letterhead)
Hide clinic logo
Skip the logo block on prescription printout
Hide legal disclaimer footer
Do not print the medicolegal disclaimer at bottom
Top Spacing for Pre-printed Header
Adds blank space at top so prescription content starts below your pre-printed letterhead/pad header
✓ Saved!
📱 Appointment Message Template
Customize the WhatsApp/SMS message sent when booking appointments. Use the placeholders shown below.
📄 Available Placeholders:
{patient} {date} {time} {doctor} {purpose} {notes} {clinic} {address} {phone}
⚠ Use *text* for bold in WhatsApp  |  Use _text_ for italic
This template is used for both "Book Appointment" (from bill view) and "Save & Send WhatsApp" (from Appointments tab).
Plain text only for SMS. Keep it short -- no bold/italic formatting.
✓ Saved!
Doctor Reminder Templates
Doctor appointment reminder WhatsApp/SMS template. placeholders :
Available Placeholders:
{doctor} {patient} {date} {time} {purpose} {clinic} {address} {phone}
! WhatsApp: *text* = bold  |  SMS: plain text only, short
Doctor appointment schedule reminder WhatsApp message.
Plain text, short. Doctor SMS reminder.

Daily Cash Book & Billing Software
Version 2.0  |  Built for dental clinics

Features: Daily cash book • Patient billing • Appointments • Receipt generation • Bill printing • Data export • Theme customisation

● Clinic Management Software
Development by
GreenCheck inc.
Empowering clinics with smart software solutions

All data stored locally in your browser.
No internet required after download.

🔒 Lock & Security
Protect the app with a 6-digit PIN. Enabled by default -- toggle off to open the app without a PIN.
🔒 Lock Screen PIN
Require 6-digit PIN on app open
⚠ Disable Lock Screen?
Anyone with device access will be able to open the app without a PIN.
Set / Change 6-Digit PIN
🔓 Remove PIN Protection
Enter your current PIN to confirm removal.
⚠ Lock screen is disabled. Anyone with access to this device can open the app without a PIN.
👤 Login Credentials
🔓 Login Screen
Show login screen on app start
Change Username & Password
✓ Credentials updated successfully!
Leave username blank to keep current username
📧 Authorized Google Emails
Only these emails can login with Google. Leave empty to allow any Google account.
👥 Staff Roles & Access Control
Add staff emails and assign roles. On login, access is automatically restricted based on their role.
Doctor (Admin) -- full access to everything.
Receptionist -- only allowed tabs below. Cannot access Cashbook, Expenses, Reports, Settings by default.
Add staff emails and assign roles. On login, access is automatically restricted.
+ Add Staff Member
🔒 Allowed Tabs for this Staff
